priority_questions: The CEO asks why ad revenue growth slowed in March.
Which monetization surface is driving or dragging growth?
Are shopping-intent surfaces scaling faster than brand video?
Where is engagement not converting into revenue?
Can we prove advertiser cohort causality from this mart?
